--- Fabi! <fabiehle@yahoo.com.br> wrote:

> Hey!!! How are u?!!
>   So long time that we don't talk!!
>   I was looking some pictures and a feelling came
> back...heheheh Miss u!!
>    
>   So much news to tell u!!
>   But i think the bigger one is that I am living in
> Taipei now!!! But I am leaving on Christmas. I am
> working soooo much here!! I am really happy. I can
> send you some pictures if you want.
>    
>   Wish I can see you one day again! 
>   Hope u are ok. 
>   Miss your funny and happy way to be.
>    
>   Biiiig kiss!!
>

body_html:
please send pictures

--- Fabi! fabiehle@yahoo.com.br wrote:

Hey!!! How are u?!!
So long time that we don't talk!!
I was looking some pictures and a feelling came
back...heheheh Miss u!!

So much news to tell u!!
But i think the bigger one is that I am living in
Taipei now!!! But I am leaving on Christmas. I am
working soooo much here!! I am really happy. I can
send you some pictures if you want.

Wish I can see you one day again!
Hope u are ok.
Miss your funny and happy way to be.

Biiiig kiss!!
